subject: Urgent: Login page white screen + order system issues too
body:
Hi,

In addition to the previously reported login white screen issue (ticket TK-501), we found today that the order system search function is also broken. Entering keywords just shows a spinner for 5 minutes with no results. This new issue is more severe as it directly impacts our customer service team's efficiency.

Please handle both!

Zhang Wei
Alpha Retail

subject: Report export issue self-resolved
body:
Hi,

The report export timeout issue we reported earlier (TK-502) -- we found it was due to the data volume being too large. Exporting in batches resolved it. The ticket can be closed.

Thanks.

Li Ming

subject: Severe data sync delay
body:
Hi,

Our data dashboard has had a data sync delay of about 2 hours since yesterday. During the sync gap, data is completely missing, not just delayed in display.

This is already affecting our ability to generate daily reports for clients. Please look into it ASAP.

Sun Li
Zeta Consulting

subject: New website is live
body: Everyone, the new website is live. Please check it out.
